title: Arcana Package Graph
subtitle: Five packages, their dependencies, and current build state
purpose: Shows the v0.1.1 package layout and dependency direction. NOTE: arcana-config was merged into arcana-core (src/config/) on 2026-05-19, reducing the graph from 5 to 4. arcana-provider-sqlite-vec was added on 2026-05-20, bringing it back to 5.

packages.role: Base — Zod schemas, provider interfaces, Logger, QueryResult envelope, ARP scopes

v0_1_progress.T4_data_model_schemas: complete (22 tests at v0.1; grown via ADRs 004–007 to include ProfileEntry, MemoryStatus, isLatest/supersededBy on Memory + Fact, Contradiction.rationale)
v0_1_progress.T5_interfaces_envelopes: complete (15 additional tests at v0.1; StructuredStore grown via ADRs 002/005/006/007: +deleteEntity, +updateMemory, +markFactSuperseded, +markMemorySuperseded)

packages.role: Kernel — createArcana() factory + ingest/retrieve/maintain/access zones + config loader (arcana-config merged in 2026-05-19) + getEntityProfile + factRetrieval implementations
packages.config_merge_note: arcana-config package DELETED on 2026-05-19. loadConfig/getDefaultConfig/ENV_MAP/ConfigSchema all now export from @kybernesis/arcana-core (src/config/). This reduces the package graph from 5 to 4.

v0_1_progress.T6_load_config: merged in — three-layer loader (defaults → file → env), 28 config tests, deep-frozen result, 7 nested sections with locked-in defaults from arcana-spec.md §11
v0_1_progress.T7_skeleton_zones: complete (zones throw NotImplementedError; SLEEP_STEPS const; access/bindings/ placeholder)
v0_1_progress.T8_createArcana_factory: complete (.providers frozen; logger defaults to createNoopLogger(); scheduler/queue fallback stubs; vector is now optional — createMissingVectorStore() fallback added same pattern as scheduler/queue)
v0_1_progress.T11_getEntityProfile: implemented (commit 7bb12c4) — assembles from live facts/insights/neighbors; stores result; returns from storage on second call; QueryResult envelope
v0_1_progress.T12_factRetrieval: implemented (commit 7bb12c4) — structured-only text-match; scores by word-hit ratio; annotates with why field; hybridSearch path deferred until sqlite-vec + FTS5 ready

packages.role: In-memory fake providers for consumer integration tests (compliance harness deferred until second real provider)
packages.note: 4 fake providers shipped (StructuredStore, VectorStore, EmbeddingProvider, LLMProvider). FakeStructuredStore updated with throw-on-unknown-id semantics for markMemorySuperseded. Compliance harness runComplianceSuite() deferred until arcana-provider-sqlite-vec or Convex provider joins libsql.

packages.role: Full StructuredStore implementation over libsql (same sync SQLite binding as KyberBot). All 9 entity types. In-memory integration tests. mkdirSync fix for file-path databases (DVR-EC-001). Unblocks KyberBot wiring initArcana().
bug_fixes: DVR-EC-001: connect() now mkdirSync(parent, {recursive:true}) before opening a file-path database, so the provider works when the data directory does not yet exist

packages.role: VectorStore over sqlite-vec (no Docker, :memory: support). vec0 virtual table with rowid_ref companion pattern. Unblocks hybridSearch and enables ChromaDB removal from KyberBot.
packages.note: VectorStore via vec0 virtual table; rowid_ref companion pattern; :memory: testing; 11 tests. Added in v0.1.1 — was planned_packages in v0.1.0 data.
